Comment:
Great coffee place with work from cafe features.
Pros:
1. The food and coffee quality is very good. Their Turkish coffee is superb. Their coffee beans are great and the cold coffees on offer are great in taste and quantity. The pricing is also adequate. They also have books for readers.
2. The store has tables for 2 which can be combined for a large group to sit together. It also has power socket on low and high tables to accommodate charging plugs for laptop and mobiles.
3. The staff is very friendly and courteous. Store manager Saif is a great person and understands the hospitality business very well. The way he interacted with us and offered drinks showed his maturity.

Over all a great place to work, spend time with family and friends.
Reply: Thrilled to know you enjoyed the coffee, food, and work-friendly vibe. We’re glad our team made your experience memorable, looking forward to welcoming you back soon!

Visited this 24hr open cafe recently and had a mixed review. For a cafe which boosts itself to be open 24 hrs was out of food at 1.30am on a Saturday night! 1. Roasted tomato & bocconcini croissant - The taste was really nice. Would surely have this again.
2. French butter croissant - It was very dry and not buttery enough making it difficult to eat.
3. Islander cold coffee - It was flavourful and delicious! One of the best I’ve had till date.
4. Americano - The coffee was rich in flavour. If you are a black coffee person, you will surely enjoy it.
5. Berry burst paradise milkshake - Avoid having the milkshakes here. It was just vanilla ice cream with a ting of strawberry essence. It felt very artificial.

All in all, their coffees are really worth having but they really need to improve their food scene if they want to sustain at this location.
Reply: Thank you for sharing your detailed review. We're glad the coffee and a few dishes stood out for you. Your feedback on late-night availability and menu consistency has been shared with the team as we work on refining the overall experience.

I ordered The Ethopian global blend beans - I asked the cafe to grind it for Pour over and they did. Thank you very much for that.

But, the ground is way fine. It's for espresso and not pour over.
This ground doesn't seem fresh at all.
There's no roast date & neither did the cafe worker knew the roast date. Sadly meaning the beans were not fresh.
I expected it to come in a pack as seen on the photo on Zomato/Swiggy.
But instead they gave me in a glass.
I made a pour over and unfortunately there was no dry or wet aroma i could appreciate and the coffee seems very average.

I'll surely try and visit the cafe and try their manual brew.
If I find it fresh and like it, I'll surely change my review.
